metadata.name: Navigation
metadata.description: Guides > Navigation between screens. Six sections + TOC + next-reads. Corrects the implicit false claim that the generator writes navigation code — it does not. Walks the spec-side contract (userActions + transitions + onNavigate method with JSON example), what the generator actually emits (Data interface callback slot + VM Base constructor that takes router, nothing else), then real hand-written wiring code for Web (Next.js App Router with TS snippets for VM + page.tsx), iOS (SwiftUI NavigationStack with Route enum), Android (Compose NavHost with sealed Route class), plus sheets/modals/tabs/back cheat sheet across all three platforms.

methods.name: onAppear
methods.description: Seed nextReadLinks from the module-scope NEXT_READ_ENTRIES catalog (two rows: next_spec_first -> /guides/writing-your-first-spec, next_testing -> /guides/testing) and stamp currentLanguage from StringManager.language. Each row's titleKey / descriptionKey is resolved through StringManager with the guides_navigation_ namespace prefix.

methods.name: onNavigate
methods.description: Client-side navigation via router.push(url). Destinations are the spec-mapped URLs enumerated in transitions: /, /guides/writing-your-first-spec, /guides/testing.

vars.name: nextReadLinks
vars.description: Two closing 'read next' cards pointing at /guides/writing-your-first-spec and /guides/testing. Seeded by onAppear from the NEXT_READ_ENTRIES static catalog and re-seeded by onToggleLanguage.

notes: Live Guides entry. Flip GUIDES_ENTRIES row for 'navigation' to 'live' in HomeViewModel when shipping.

Six sections: (1) contract (userActions + transitions + onNavigate method, JSON snippet), (2) what the generator actually writes (text tree + callout bullet — the 'generator does NOT emit Route enum / NavHost' point), (3) Web router wiring (TS VM + TS page.tsx hand-written snippets), (4) iOS SwiftUI NavigationStack with Route enum hand-written snippet, (5) Android Compose NavHost with sealed Route class hand-written snippet, (6) sheet / full-modal / tabs / back 4-way bullet cheat-sheet across platforms.

Corrects prior implicit false claim that the generator writes navigation code or that jsonui-navigation-ios/android agents 'emit the platform-specific navigation call' — those agents assist authoring, but the code lands as hand-written VM impl / Route enums / NavHost definitions, not @generated.
Deprecated strings: section_spec_* and toc_row_spec remain in strings.json as unreferenced dead entries to minimise cross-session merge risk (section_contract is the new equivalent).
